'''U'Han Swinol''' was an out-of-work [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musician who lived the during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Haugg Nerf Industries]] for defaulting on a loan and had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,000 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]]. This bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
